steps.assistant_text: Cast-bug fix (EPISODE-HONESTY): a USO data-symbol argument that was passed via an `extern char gl_ref_NNNNN` placeholder (so the HI16/LO16 addend landed in the relocation entry, leaving the .text immediate at 0) is rewritten as `(char *)&D_00000000 + 0xNNNNN`, which folds the absolute addend into the .text words exactly as the target encodes them. gl_ref_NNNNN = 0xNNNNN and D_00000000 = 0 both resolve to the same linked address, so the ROM is unchanged (objdiff was already 100 via reloc-awareness); the win is self-contained honest C plus a schema-valid episode. gl_func_00000000 / D_00000000 are canonical USO load-resolved placeholders (= 0 in undefined_syms_auto.txt).

metadata.verification: byte-exact (.text word-diff = 0 vs expected/.o, reloc-aware); full make ROM byte-identical to baserom (ROM OK).
